terms.name: Resource
terms.definition: Any physical, digital, or financial asset governed by the institution

terms.name: Asset
terms.definition: A tracked institutional resource with lifecycle and stewardship

terms.name: Steward
terms.definition: Human responsible for resource care and mission alignment

terms.name: Custodian
terms.definition: Human currently using or holding the resource

terms.name: Facility
terms.definition: Physical location containing governed spaces

terms.name: Space
terms.definition: Reservable area within a facility

terms.name: Reservation
terms.definition: Time-bound allocation of a resource to a human or mission

terms.name: Inventory
terms.definition: Consumable or quantity-tracked resources

terms.name: Consumable
terms.definition: Resource depleted through use

terms.name: Procurement
terms.definition: Governed purchase workflow from need to audit

terms.name: Budget
terms.definition: Allocated funds with committed, spent, and remaining tracking

terms.name: Expense
terms.definition: Recorded expenditure with mission and budget context

terms.name: Funding Source
terms.definition: Origin of funds with restriction enforcement

terms.name: Vendor
terms.definition: External organization providing goods or services

terms.name: Contract
terms.definition: Formal agreement with renewal and compliance tracking

terms.name: Maintenance
terms.definition: Scheduled or completed service on maintainable assets

terms.name: Fleet
terms.definition: Institutional vehicle resources with mission history

terms.name: Digital Asset
terms.definition: Documents, media, and brand assets with version history

terms.name: Resource Health
terms.definition: Planning metrics for condition, utilization, and risk

terms.name: Lifecycle
terms.definition: Audited stages from request through retirement

terms.name: Ownership Type
terms.definition: Governance classification of resource ownership

terms.name: Mission Assignment
terms.definition: Link between resource and operational mission

terms.name: Stewardship
terms.definition: Responsible care of resources for mission accomplishment
